conversations.say: Inez, Section 3 is here and the room is trying to turn our camera gap into a murder story. Let's make sure our coordinated disclosure boundary holds firm to protect our tenant.
conversations.offer: Complete alignment on our disclosure boundary and mutual neighborhood backing.
conversations.request: Fulfill our commitment to keep tenant anonymity safe while presenting the timeline clearly.

conversations.say: Morgan, regarding your report: here is the bounded operational account of the service exit and audit context, provided with the firm understanding that resident anonymity is protected.
conversations.offer: Exact operational details of the service exit and camera audit context.
conversations.request: Strict adherence to fair treatment and protection of uninvolved building residents in your final reconstruction.

conversations.say: Rafi, let's lock in our shift and delivery comparisons before the final ballot so nobody twists routine building access into malicious intent.
conversations.offer: Our verified service exit and shift-change notes.
conversations.request: Your confirmation that routine delivery patterns and building access were entirely ordinary.

public_statement: The service exit was used during an unpreserved camera interval, and an automated access change occurred separately later. Technical equipment gaps and routine building access do not equal malice or murder.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure boundaries regarding the camera interval and protect tenant anonymity.

goal_progress: Fulfilled disclosure coordination with Inez to protect tenant anonymity.
Provided a bounded operational account to Morgan while securing fair treatment terms.
Reconciled service exit and delivery timelines with Rafi.
Completed the final ballot reflecting local building realities and separating technical equipment gaps from murder.
reasoning_summary: Dee Nowak finalizes conversations with Inez and Morgan, fulfilling the disclosure boundary to protect uninvolved residents while providing a bounded operational account. The final ballot reflects Dee's conviction that routine service exits and technical camera gaps do not establish murder or autonomous AI intent.
